title: School — FBLA, YES, internship, SAT four-pillar todo
html:
TL;DR

  • Oct 17, 2019 school-bucket note: "Chinese recording / Other: Solidify position on FBA / YES shit / Internship / SAT" — five-line consolidation of the senior-year scholarship-application stack.
  • "FBA" is a typo or shorthand for FBLA (Future Business Leaders of America) per the cluster of contemporaneous FBLA-references; "solidify position" implies an officer/leadership role.
  • "YES shit" = YES Kennedy Lugar — the State Dept high-school study-abroad scholarship surfaced in 2019 09 23 write scripture for brenda as well; this is the second mention this fall.
  • "Internship / SAT" — same two-pillar formula appearing in 2019 10 29 mrs bland internship and yes shit twelve days later, locking in the internship + SAT + YES + FBLA scholarship stack.
  • "Chinese recording" — recurring Mandarin-3 oral-recording assignment also seen in 2019 10 08 chinese practice and 2019 12 12 talk to brenda.

Key items

  • Chinese recording (Mandarin-3 assignment)
  • Solidify FBLA position
  • YES Kennedy-Lugar application
  • Internship hunt
  • SAT prep

Why it matters in the graph

This is the most compressed scholarship-stack note in the 2019 corpus: five bullets, four of which are independent application channels (FBLA leadership / YES Kennedy-Lugar / internship / SAT). Read together with 2019 09 23 write scripture for brenda and 2019 10 29 mrs bland internship and yes shit, it confirms the applied-everywhere strategy Yahir was running for the Ford Family Foundation full-ride that eventually landed.

Chinese class sits at the top of the list — a sign that even mid-overload, language study was the daily-recurring obligation. The fact that "FBA" (a typo for FBLA) reads naturally as Amazon-FBA in 2026 hindsight is the kind of -induced ambiguity that motivates retroactive linking.
